profile.name: Ritik
profile.headline: Full-Stack Developer | MERN, TypeScript, and AI Workflows | Building Scalable Web and SaaS Products
profile.about: Hi, I am Ritik, a full-stack developer focused on building scalable web and mobile applications with MERN, TypeScript, and modern AI workflows. I actively build product-style projects from idea to deployment, including IntellixChat, VIZO, PIXELFLIX, Software Helper, AI Dealer Breaker, AI Battle Areana, and this macOS portfolio experience. My current strengths are React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, real-time architecture, and modern UI systems. I am a BCA student in Software Engineering at Amity University Online and part of Sheryians Cohort 2.0, continuously improving through hands-on shipping and problem solving.
